top_signals.title: Pope says AI should be ‘disarmed’ to avoid dominating humanity
top_signals.summary: Pope Leo XIV said artificial intelligence should be "disarmed” to protect humanity from its dangers, adding his voice to a heated debate over the extent to which governments should regulate a technology that is reshaping the world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: For minorities, fear of World Cup immigration curbs overshadows soccer devotion
top_signals.summary: The risk of ICE activity around U.S. matches has sparked concerns among the Hispanic community, 20% of the U.S. population, and the Haitian community.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
